title: 21A passed by Cabinet; To be tabled in Parliament soon – Harin
body_lines: COLOMBO (News 1st); The 21st Amendment to the Constitution was tabled and passed in cabinet today (20) and will be tabled in Parliament soon, said Minister Harin Fernando in a tweet.
21A passed by Cabinet; To be tabled in Parliament soon – Harin
‘Will NOT take oaths as MP or Minister until decision on FR’ – Dhammika promises to SC
